From two-step cascade analysis, (see
Author's remarks: The data were slightly
corrected relative those in the paper NPA762 (2005)
(Table 5). Primarily, the single spectrum of the
184W(n,g)185W reaction was rather rare due to its
small cross section. Yield is only about 46% in the
target. After subtraction of peaks from others
isotopes we get a basic set of data for tab. 5. It is
clear that many remaining peaks continue to be
multiplets. Also uncertainties of their areas after
subtraction are raised up. Therefore, in general, the
numerical data in tab 5 are given with larger
uncertainties.
Evaluated Gamma-ray Activation File (2003).
184W isotopic abundance 30.64(2)% adopted.
